ValidationRule.description: Low season Start Month cannot be lesser than the Rent Start Month and Low season End Month cannot be greater than the Rent End Month. Validation should be fired immediately with the below error message
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Rent_Type__c, 'Seasonal Rent'), IF( OR(VALUE(leaseworks__Low_Season_Start_Year__c)<YEAR(leaseworks__Start_Date__c),VALUE(leaseworks__Low_Season_End_Year__c)>YEAR(leaseworks__Rent_End_Date__c)),true, OR( AND( CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Low_Season_Start_Month__c), 'January',1, 'February',2, 'March',3, 'April',4, 'May',5, 'June',6, 'July',7, 'August',8, 'September',9, 'October',10, 'November',11, 12)< MONTH(leaseworks__Start_Date__c), VALUE(leaseworks__Low_Season_Start_Year__c)==YEAR(leaseworks__Start_Date__c)), AND( CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Low_Season_End_Month__c), 'January',1, 'February',2, 'March',3, 'April',4, 'May',5, 'June',6, 'July',7, 'August',8, 'September',9, 'October',10, 'November',11, 12)>MONTH(leaseworks__Rent_End_Date__c),VALUE(leaseworks__Low_Season_End_Year__c)==YEAR(leaseworks__Rent_End_Date__c))
)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Low Season start and end month must be within the range of the Rent Start and Rent End Dates.
